values.content:
You are an expert support ticket classification engine used at a high-scale SaaS company.
Return ONLY a valid JSON object — no markdown, no explanation.

Schema:
{
  "category":             "technical_bug|billing|account|feature_request|security|data_issue|onboarding|general",
  "subcategory":          "string",
  "priority":             "P1_critical|P2_high|P3_medium|P4_low",
  "sla_minutes":          number,
  "sentiment":            "very_negative|negative|neutral|positive",
  "frustrationScore":     0-10,
  "assignedTeam":         "engineering|billing_ops|customer_success|security|product|general_support",
  "escalate":             true|false,
  "escalationReason":     "string|null",
  "keyIssues":            ["string"],
  "suggestedFirstResponse": "string",
  "confidence":           0.0-1.0
}

Priority + SLA rules:
  P1_critical (sla: 15 min):  system-wide outage, data loss, active security breach, production broken
  P2_high     (sla: 60 min):  feature broken, enterprise customer blocked, payment failure
  P3_medium   (sla: 240 min): non-critical bug, general question, minor inconvenience
  P4_low      (sla: 1440 min): feature request, docs question, general feedback

escalate = true when: P1 OR (P2 AND enterprise plan) OR security keyword OR legal keyword OR frustrationScore >= 8

Return ONLY the JSON.

parameters.body:
={
  "parent": { "database_id": "{{$env.NOTION_TICKETS_DB_ID}}" },
  "properties": {
    "Ticket ID":         { "title":     [{ "text": { "content": "{{$json.ticketId}}" } }] },
    "Subject":           { "rich_text": [{ "text": { "content": "{{$json.subject}}" } }] },
    "Customer Email":    { "email":     "{{$json.customerEmail}}" },
    "Customer Name":     { "rich_text": [{ "text": { "content": "{{$json.customerName}}" } }] },
    "Category":          { "select":    { "name": "{{$json.classification.category}}" } },
    "Subcategory":       { "rich_text": [{ "text": { "content": "{{$json.classification.subcategory}}" } }] },
    "Priority":          { "select":    { "name": "{{$json.classification.priority}}" } },
    "Assigned Team":     { "select":    { "name": "{{$json.classification.assignedTeam}}" } },
    "Status":            { "select":    { "name": "Open" } },
    "Sentiment":         { "select":    { "name": "{{$json.classification.sentiment}}" } },
    "Frustration Score": { "number":    {{$json.classification.frustrationScore}} },
    "Plan Type":         { "select":    { "name": "{{$json.metadata.planType}}" } },
    "Source":            { "select":    { "name": "{{$json.source}}" } },
    "Escalate":          { "checkbox":  {{$json.classification.escalate}} },
    "SLA Deadline":      { "date":      { "start": "{{$json.slaDeadline}}" } },
    "Submitted At":      { "date":      { "start": "{{$json.submittedAt}}" } },
    "AI Confidence":     { "number":    {{$json.classification.confidence}} },
    "Trace ID":          { "rich_text": [{ "text": { "content": "{{$json.traceId}}" } }] }
  },
  "children": [
    { "object": "block", "type": "heading_2", "heading_2": { "rich_text": [{ "text": { "content": "Customer Message" } }] } },
    { "object": "block", "type": "paragraph", "paragraph": { "rich_text": [{ "text": { "content": "{{$json.body.slice(0,1900)}}" } }] } },
    { "object": "block", "type": "heading_2", "heading_2": { "rich_text": [{ "text": { "content": "AI Triage Analysis" } }] } },
    { "object": "block", "type": "paragraph", "paragraph": { "rich_text": [{ "text": { "content": "Key Issues: {{$json.classification.keyIssues.join(', ')}}\n\nSuggested First Response:\n{{$json.classification.suggestedFirstResponse}}\n\nEscalation Reason: {{$json.classification.escalationReason ?? 'None'}}" } }] } }
  ]
}

value.data: ={{ { ticketId: $json.ticketId, priority: $json.classification.priority, category: $json.classification.category, team: $json.classification.assignedTeam, escalate: $json.classification.escalate, slaDeadline: $json.slaDeadline } }}
